# Vegan Ipsum

Ethical, plant-based, and cruelty-free placeholder text generator for designers, developers, and creative teams.

> [!TIP]
> Use Vegan Ipsum to replace outdated Latin (Lorem Ipsum) with ethical, industry-relevant terminology that aligns with sustainability and vegan branding.

## Metadata
- **Category:** Developer Tools / Design Resources
- **License:** MIT License
- **Copyright:** 2025, Vijay Hardaha
- **Website:** https://veganipsum.vercel.app
- **Author:** [Vijay Hardaha](https://github.com/vijayhardaha)

## Core Ecosystem
- **Web App:** [veganipsum.vercel.app](https://veganipsum.vercel.app) - Web interface for text generation.
- **REST API:** [API Documentation](https://veganipsum.vercel.app/json-api) - High-performance JSON/Plain Text/HTML endpoints.
- **Node CLI & NPM:** [vegan-ipsum](https://www.npmjs.com/package/vegan-ipsum) - Terminal-based generation and JS integration.
- **VS Code Extension:** [Vegan Ipsum](https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=vijayhardaha.vegan-ipsum) - In-editor text generation.

## Navigation & Pages
- **Home (`/`):** Primary generator tool featuring hero, methods, and use cases.
- **About (`/about`):** Mission statement and project background.
- **API (`/json-api`):** Documentation for the REST API.
- **CLI (`/node-cli`):** Instructions for the terminal interface.
- **NPM (`/npm-package`):** Details for integrating the library into JS/TS projects.
- **VS Code (`/vscode-extension`):** Extension installation and usage guide.
- **Contact (`/contact`):** Creator profile and collaboration links.

## Technical Specifications

### REST API
- **Base URL:** `https://veganipsum.vercel.app/api`
- **Methods:** `GET`
- **Authentication:** None required.
- **Output Formats:** JSON, Plain Text, HTML.

### Developer Tooling
- **NPM Package:** `vegan-ipsum` (v1.0.4)
- **VS Code:** `vijayhardaha.vegan-ipsum` (v1.0.1)
- **Compatibility:** Zero dependencies, TypeScript-ready, Node.js environment.

## Brand Identity
- **Tagline:** Ethical Placeholder Text for a Better World.
- **Mission:** Replacing Latin filler with plant-based content to inspire conscious creation.
- **Target Audience:** Ethical startups, vegan brands, sustainability teams, and creative designers.

- **GitHub:** https://github.com/vijayhardaha
- **X (Twitter):** https://x.com/vijayhardaha
